title: Your Certs Are Expiring: Digital Certificate Management Explained
summary: IBM Technology explains digital certificate management and its role in cybersecurity. The video covers what digital certificates are, the risks of shorter certificate lifetimes, and why certificate lifecycle management is critical for enterprises.
